---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem this feature would solve. What's the current limitation or pain point?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your ideal solution. How would you like to use this feature?

## Example Usage

Show an example of how you'd like to use this feature:

```bash
rv <command> [options]
```

Or in `manifest.yaml`:

```yaml
# example config
```

## Alternative Approaches

Are there any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered?

## Additional Context

- [ ] This is related to a specific user persona (end-user, contributor, advanced user, etc.)
- [ ] This would be a breaking change
- [ ] This is a documentation improvement request

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] This feature doesn't already exist (checked the README and docs)
- [ ] This aligns with Revive's core mission (transactional, safe, dotfile management)
